# Apple Accessibility Audit

Perform Apple-style accessibility audits of UI designs, screenshots, prototypes, web/app pages, or design descriptions against WCAG 2.2 Level AA.

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add apple-accessibility-audit --to ./skills
```
